on_load: ^Welcome to Gnomies! Use WASD to move and Spacebar to jump.
soil_bag_removed: ^"Thank yoose. I got stuck under that soil bag there afta tryin' to hide from dem evil trolls. Luckily yoose saved me- Say, I couldn't do it alone but if we work togetha we could maybe fight back against dem trolls."

b: ^"Well, the first step would to somehow knock that there lock off tha' door there. Open that and we can get out to tha' garden and save our brothers."
^"Would ya look at that. Seems like all we gotta doose is go out the door to the garden."
